inputs.shell: while [ ! -f /workspace/.runpod_agentic/startup.ready ]; do sleep 1; done; exec tmux attach -t crag-pi

inputs.packages: ca-certificates curl git jq gnupg tmux

inputs.command:
set -e
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$HOME/.bun/bin:$HOME/.cargo/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH"
set -a
. /workspace/.runpod_agentic/session.env
set +a
WORKSPACE_DIR=/workspace CRAG_RUNTIME_DIR=/workspace/.runpod_agentic AGENT_PROMPT_FILE=/workspace/.runpod_agentic/prompt.txt AGENT_SYSTEM_PROMPT_FILE=/workspace/.runpod_agentic/system_prompt.txt MCP_SERVERS_FILE=/workspace/.runpod_agentic/mcp_servers.json bash /workspace/.runpod_agentic/launcher.d/10-preflight.sh
cat > /workspace/.runpod_agentic/start-pi-terminal.sh <<'PI_TERMINAL'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
cd /workspace
exec pi --provider ollama-cloud --model "${AGENT_MODEL:-deepseek-v4-flash}" "$(cat /workspace/.runpod_agentic/prompt.txt)"
PI_TERMINAL
chmod +x /workspace/.runpod_agentic/start-pi-terminal.sh
tmux kill-session -t crag-pi 2>/dev/null || true
tmux new-session -d -s crag-pi /workspace/.runpod_agentic/start-pi-terminal.sh
mkdir -p /workspace/e2e
tmux capture-pane -t crag-pi -p -S -200 > /workspace/e2e/pi-terminal-start.txt || true

inputs.system_prompt: You are running inside a CRAG web terminal. Answer concisely and mention that the Ollama Cloud connection is configured.

inputs.prompt: Say hello from Pi running in the web terminal, then ask the user what they want to build next.
